response.content:
Meridian's house view on equities this quarter is as follows:

- US equities: Neutral-to-constructive. Mega-cap technology continues to drive index-level earnings, with the 'Magnificent Five' accounting for 36 % of S&P 500 EPS. Meridian prefers a quality-factor tilt and sees Healthcare and Industrials as the best risk-adjusted sectors for H2 2026.
- European equities: Modest overweight — valuations at 13x 2027e EPS vs. 21x US; the ECB is ahead of the Fed in the rate cycle.
- Emerging markets: Underweight — China property overhang and USD strength suppress upside.
